title: cassine schlechteri
intro: Cassine schlechteri, also known as the 'Sudan thorn', is a plant species native to the savannas and grasslands of sub-Saharan Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic activities. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an anthelmintic to treat parasitic worm infestations. In herbal preparations, Cassine schlechteri is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
